gloss_pattern: verb + AOR + D3 distance + estative MPN
example: puuçnena = como que le dio de comer

gloss_pattern: verb + IMPF + INT aspect + estative MPN

spanish_meaning: is no longer going to V
example: mjiyãwayã' = ya no más va a trabajar
alku' luuçxa's wa'kxku = el perro mordió al niño
kla' ya'yaçkiputx = las vacas se dejaron arrear
misxkuk Karlusa's wa'kx = it was the cat who bit Carlos

spanish_meaning: it was O whom S V'd
example: misxa' Karlusa'skuk wa'kx = it was Carlos whom the cat bit

spanish_meaning: it was at LOC that S V'd O
example: yattekuk misxa' Karlusa's wa'kx = it was at the house the cat bit Carlos

spanish_meaning: it was at T that S V'd O
example: saptukuk misxa' Karlusa's wa'kx = it was on Saturday the cat bit Carlos

gloss_pattern: subj + unmarked OD + OBJ-marked OI + verb
example: Tmigu' ya'ja u'kwe's pesku = Domingo me regaló una mochila

gloss_pattern: OD appears bare when contextually clear
example: luuça' çxaju ũ'wek = el niño come piña
kusia' kabildote ũsuth = this morning I was at Cabildo
kuskaya' çxhabju u'jeçtha'w = tomorrow we leave from town
Lilia' ya'ja agxji vxitku = Lilia made a mochila for me
Selsu' Silvxinayakh ku'juk = Celso dances with Silvina
çxiçxa's çxilxuh wakath = I cut meat with the knife
mjiyãk pheʼjuwa = mientras trabajaba se reía
mjiyãna adxaʼ kãsekiku = mientras él trabajaba yo descansé
uy zxiçxkwesa ahkuk = la mujer que es bonita cocinó
mjisaweʼsx ũʼa ewaʼ = la comida de los que trabajan es buena
misxkuk Karlusaʼs waʼkx = fue el gato quien mordió a Carlos
misxaʼ Karlusaʼskuk waʼkx = fue a Carlos a quien el gato mordió

spanish_meaning: it was at LOC that S V'd O
example: yattekuk misxaʼ Karlusaʼs waʼkx = fue en la casa donde el gato mordió a Carlos

gloss_pattern: WH question = WH word + INTE on predicate
clauses placed in sequence with no morpheme
example: adxaʼ uʼjuthu / igxaʼ kãsegu = yo me fui; tú descansaste
adxaʼ uʼjuthu maa igxaʼ kãsegu = yo me fui pero tú descansaste
adxaʼ uʼjuthu iʼpa igxaʼ kãsegu = yo me fui o tú descansaste
adxaʼ uʼjuthu vxitku igxaʼ kãsegu = yo me fui entonces tú descansaste
